task_objective: Refactor legacy os.path and string concatenation to pathlib.Path in discovery.py and main.py
design_decisions: Migrated discovery.find_ludusavi to support pathlib.Path in public API.
Replaced os.path usage in Ludusavi.log_dir, Ludusavi.log_show, and Ludusavi.add_game_alias with pathlib.Path equivalents.
Updated unit tests to mock pathlib.Path methods (exists, read_text, write_text) instead of os.path/builtins.open.
results: All tests passed, type checks passed, and ruff linting passed. Baseline code coverage maintained.
